children.name: Modern Algebra Section 4.6
children.title: Modern Algebra Section 4.6
children.author: Hudson & Silvester
children.description: A snippet from Section 4.6 of Chapter 4 of 'Modern Algebra' by Hudson & Silvester. This excerpt reconstructs the lost 1895 work of Bach and Bernul on the Railway Points Problem, introducing an algebraic calculus of routes. It translates unidirectional railway switches into directed graphs and proves that the minimum number of switches required for a perfect n-track junction is exactly 2(n-1).

children.name: 17-gon construction
children.title: 17-gon construction
children.author: Classical geometry tradition
children.description: A reconstructed treatment of the classical compass-and-straightedge construction for the regular 17-gon, revealing the algebraic principles behind constructible polygons.

children.name: A Mathematician's Apology
children.title: A Mathematician's Apology
children.author: G. H. Hardy
children.description: G. H. Hardy's classic essay defending pure mathematics, combining intellectual history with a personal meditation on beauty, value, and the life of the mathematical mind.

children.name: Analysis of the Infinite
children.title: Analysis of the Infinite
children.author: Leonhard Euler; translated and annotated edition
children.description: A modern annotated edition of Euler's seminal 1748 work, tracing the birth of analysis and the infinite series that laid the foundations of classical calculus.

children.name: Gödel's Proof
children.title: Gödel's Proof
children.author: Ernest Nagel & James R. Newman
children.description: An accessible introduction to Kurt Gödel's incompleteness theorems, addressing both the technical proofs and their philosophical implications for formal systems.

children.name: Nonlinear Dynamics and Chaos
children.title: Nonlinear Dynamics and Chaos
children.author: Steven H. Strogatz
children.description: A practical and intuitive introduction to nonlinear dynamical systems and chaos theory, with applications spanning physics, biology, chemistry, and engineering.

children.name: Ramanujan: Twelve Lectures on Subjects Suggested by His Life and Work
children.title: Ramanujan: Twelve Lectures on Subjects Suggested by His Life and Work
children.author: G. H. Hardy
children.description: A celebrated set of lectures by G. H. Hardy inspired by Srinivasa Ramanujan's work, offering a coherent exposition of the theory and ideas behind Ramanujan's mathematical legacy.

children.name: CS217 Lecture 5
children.title: CS217 Lecture 5
children.description: Lecture notes on a computer science mathematics topic

children.name: A. M. Turing Paper
children.title: A. M. Turing Paper
children.description: A foundational paper on computation and machine intelligence

children.name: Gödel's Incompleteness Theorem
children.title: Gödel's Incompleteness Theorem
children.description: An English translation and explanation of Gödel's paper

children.name: The 17-gon
children.title: The 17-gon
children.description: A concise note on the regular 17-gon and its constructibility

children.name: Turing
children.title: Turing
children.description: A classic paper on computation and machine intelligence
